name: Vegan Eggnog
recipeIngredient: 2 packages silken tofu (10 oz each), regular or low-fat
16 ounces vanilla soymilk or rice milk
1/2 to 1 cup rum or brandy, optional nutmeg
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except nutmeg in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend thoroughly, stopping occasionally to scrape down sides.
3. Serve well chilled and dust with nutmeg. Serves about 8.
